warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Planning, Development, and Implementation
criteria.description: Explain how the project was planned, created, and put into action.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The process for planning, developing, and implementing the project is not detailed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The explanation of the project's planning, development, or implementation process is unclear or one of these stages is not covered.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A clear explanation of the project's planning, development, and implementation stages is provided.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A clear explanation of the project's planning, development, and implementation stages is provided, supported by reasons and proof.

criteria.name: Website Features
criteria.description: Showcase all mandatory components of the project as outlined in the instructions.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The website either deviates from the assigned subject or lacks the necessary components.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website addresses the correct subject but only incorporates some of the mandatory features.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website presented adheres to the topic and contains every essential element.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website presented is relevant to the topic, includes all essential elements, and offers additional features.

criteria.name: Website UX Design
criteria.description: The design incorporates suitable colors, contrast, backgrounds, typefaces, and images, along with accessibility features, to improve the user experience.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Design components are absent, inconsistent, or create distractions. There is no apparent thought given to user experience or accessibility.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: While some design elements are used correctly, problems exist with legibility, uniformity, or accessibility. The user experience might seem incomplete or difficult to navigate.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website employs appropriate colors, typefaces, backgrounds, and visuals that integrate effectively. Accessibility features are included and contribute to a good user experience.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website's design is refined, visually coherent, and easy for users to navigate. Design elements are carefully chosen to boost usability and accessibility, leading to a highly effective and inclusive user experience.

criteria.name: Website Content
criteria.description: Accuracy of grammar, spelling, and punctuation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The website contains four or more grammatical or spelling mistakes.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website contains three or fewer spelling or grammatical errors.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website has one grammatical error and no spelling mistakes.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website is entirely free of grammatical and spelling errors.

criteria.name: Website Content
criteria.description: Provides evidence and references for all information gathered during research.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No sources are referenced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Sources or references are infrequently provided to back up claims.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Generally, credible professional sources and resources are present to support statements.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Convincing evidence from credible professional sources and resources is supplied to substantiate statements.

criteria.name: Website Evaluation
criteria.description: The website functions correctly across various computing environments.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The website is not functional on any computing environments.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website only works correctly on a single computing environment.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website loads and operates correctly on at least two computing environments.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website loads and operates correctly on more than two computing environments.

criteria.name: Website Evaluation
criteria.description: The website's interactive features work correctly and are free of errors.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The website's interactive elements have errors that prevent them from working.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website's interactive elements have errors, but they do not stop them from functioning.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website's interactive elements operate without any errors.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The website's interactive elements are error-free and improve the user's interaction.

criteria.name: Website Evaluation
criteria.description: All components of the website maintain uniformity across every page.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Only a single page is presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The pages lack uniformity.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The pages maintain uniformity.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The pages are uniform, and their elements enhance the user's interaction.

criteria.name: Website Evaluation
criteria.description: An explanation of the metrics intended for use in assessing the website's success.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No planned methods for measuring success are outlined.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The planned methods for measuring success are vaguely addressed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The planned methods for measuring website success are clearly detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The planned methods for measuring advanced website success are detailed and enhanced by the use of professional terminology.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The clarity and structure of the presentation's delivery.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were ready, but the presentation lacked a logical progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed logically, and the statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: The presenter consistently exhibits self-assurance, composed posture, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified abilities were shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were demonstrated, which improved the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to answer questions competently.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Does not respond to inquiries, or responses are completely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides partial or unclear responses, indicating a limited grasp of the subject.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers most questions accurately and clearly, demonstrating sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful answers that enhance the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: Compliance with the rules for competitive events.

levels.label: Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not adhere to the instructions.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The execution was in line with the guidelines: (All conditions must be satisfied) Only permitted technological devices were used (size specifications were followed; a maximum of three). The presentation matched the assigned topic. Professional boundaries were maintained during setup time (no interaction with judges). No materials were left behind after the presentation. Links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges). Audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round). The use of food or live animals was avoided.
